policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-cr-04 - Public network access'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Container+Registry#IncidentremediationContainerRegistry-drcp-cr-04 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP ACR Trusted Microsoft services should be allowed
policyDefinition.description: This policy enforces that the option 'Allow trusted Microsoft services to access this container registry' is enabled for vulnerability scanning.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
